title: Fragment. Adapted From The Vita Nuova Of Dante.
content:
What Mary is when she a little smiles
    I cannot even tell or call to mind,
    It is a miracle so new, so rare.
meaning:
"Fragment. Adapted From The Vita Nuova Of Dante." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
